## Problem

A clear description of the problem or motivation for the feature.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references that help explain the feature request.
